recentHighlights: The Assignment (S5E05) — A Pah-wraith possesses Keiko, forces O'Brien to reconfigure DS9 into a chroniton beam. Perfect structural coercion: refusal not survivable. O'Brien's subversion from within — rewriting the beam to fire at the runabout instead.

...Nor the Battle to the Strong (S5E04) — Jake Sisko's war story. The line between courage and cowardice. Burke's death, the Ensign's self-inflicted wound, the accidental ceiling collapse. Sisko's B-plot on the Defiant.

Looking for par'Mach in All the Wrong Places (S5E03) — Written by Ronald D. Moore, directed by Andrew Robinson. The Klingon romantic comedy of manners. Worf's VCD puppet courtship, Quark's terrible poetry, O'Brien-Kira's near-crossing. The control architecture that fails and the freedom that enters through the crack.
The Ship (S5E02) — Siege bottle episode. Muniz's death, O'Brien's vigil, Worf's Ak'voh. A dying Founder triggers Jem'Hadar mass suicide. Kilana's devastating final question.
Apocalypse Rising (S5E01) — The changeling is Martok, not Gowron. Odo chooses his own face. Founders' catalytic misdirection at its finest.
